license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xh8fj9w
title: U Mass - STZ-induced type 1 diabetes model
author: Jason Kim

steps_raw.instruction: Administer an intraperitoneal injection of streptozotocin (50 mg/kg body weight) daily for 5 days.
Monitor glucose level for onset of hyperglycemia.
